phase: P1 — IPC Contract, Service Launcher Abstraction & Tauri Skeleton

quality_gates.name: emo-runtime-service pattern (no direct uvicorn in UI)
quality_gates.evidence: ipc_contract.md defines emo-runtime-service Launcher/Proxy; RuntimeClient uses Tauri IPC, never uvicorn

quality_gates.name: runtime.events WebSocket/SSE defined in IPC contract
quality_gates.evidence: event_stream_contract.md defines 5 event types; test_event_stream_schema.ts validates all 5

quality_gates.name: GET /trace/{trace_id} in IPC + Zustand cache
quality_gates.evidence: ipc_contract.md defines get_trace(); runtime.ts store caches traces; test_trace_api_contract.ts validates schema

quality_gates.name: RuntimeTelemetry typed & consumed by store
quality_gates.evidence: types/telemetry.ts defines 6-field schema; RuntimeMonitor.tsx consumes it; test_telemetry_schema_integrity.ts validates

quality_gates.name: Coming Soon stub — no fake data
quality_gates.evidence: MemoryExplorer.tsx shows Coming Soon / Read Only; no useRuntimeStore; no fake data; test_ui_routing_completeness.ts verifies

quality_gates.name: Future Compatibility clause in ipc_contract.md
quality_gates.evidence: ipc_contract.md §Future Compatibility: 6 rules (no breaking fields, endpoints, events; versioned; 2-release window; Memory/Skill/Cognitive/Enterprise scope)

quality_gates.name: No modifications to core/, tests/, docs/ or DEVELOPER.md
quality_gates.evidence: All P1 files under emo-desktop/ and artifacts/product/ only

quality_gates.name: No misleading Memory OS data or features
quality_gates.evidence: MemoryExplorer.tsx: explicit Coming Soon + read-only terminal output; no mock visualizations

deliverables.routes: 8 screens (7 functional + Memory Explorer Coming Soon)
deliverables.store: runtime.ts — Zustand state, events, telemetry, trace cache
